backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining diagram state types (icons, connections, drawings, lines, text labels), user profiles, and CRUD operations for saving/loading/deleting named diagrams with authorization checks.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two high-confidence features: fixing TypeScript compilation errors in AttackPathPage.tsx and ensuring valid frontend asset paths and imports.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including components, pages, hooks, utilities, and configuration files for the threat hunting portal application.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles defining OKLCH color system variables for light and dark themes with security-focused dark blue/teal palette.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite-based React application with root div and module script import.
frontend/index.ts: Example code snippet demonstrating html2canvas usage for exporting canvas elements to PNG images.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component with TanStack Router setup, Internet Identity authentication, profile setup modal, and protected routes for report and attack path pages.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathCanvas: Interactive canvas component managing icon placement with resize, connections, drawing modes (freehand/line/arrow), text labels with rotation/resize, eraser functionality, and transform tool with visual handles.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathConnec: SVG connector component rendering directional arrows between icons with hover effects and click handlers for deletion.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathIcon.t: Reusable icon component with drag-and-drop support, mapping IconType to asset paths with dynamic width/height props.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathToolba: Toolbar component for attack path diagram editor with draggable icon types (user, email, attacker, computer, etc.), drawing tools (freehand, line, arrow, text, eraser), and action buttons (undo, save, load, export, clear). Includes text color picker and manages active drawing tool state.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout with header navigation (Reports, Attack Path, New Report), user profile display, login button, hero banner on homepage, and footer with caffeine.ai attribution. Uses TanStack Router for navigation.
frontend/src/components/LoadDiagramDialo: Dialog component for loading saved attack path diagrams with list view showing diagram metadata (icons count, connections count, last modified date) and delete functionality with confirmation alert dialog.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Logout button component that uses Internet Identity authentication, clears identity and query cache on logout, and only renders when user is authenticated.
frontend/src/components/LoginPage.tsx: Full-page login screen with Internet Identity authentication, displaying shield icon, app title, security messaging, and login button with loading state.
frontend/src/components/MitreTechniqueSe: Searchable combobox component for selecting MITRE ATT&CK techniques from predefined data with support for adding custom techniques. Displays selected techniques as removable badges and shows technique ID, name, and description in dropdown.
frontend/src/components/PdfGeneratorButt: Button component that generates PDF reports from DetailedReport data using pdfGenerator utility, shows loading state during generation, and displays toast notifications for success/error.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for first-time user profile setup requiring name input, prevents closing until profile is created, and uses useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/ReportForm.tsx: A comprehensive form component for creating incident reports with fields for title, author, executive summary, threat actors, MITRE techniques, IOCs, findings, timeline, attack vectors, evidence, affected systems, remediation actions, and recommendations. Includes dynamic array management for threat actors, IOCs, and findings with add/remove functionality.
frontend/src/components/SaveDiagramDialo: A dialog component for saving attack path diagrams that prompts the user to enter a diagram name. Handles save/cancel actions with loading states and keyboard shortcuts.
frontend/src/data/mitreAttackData.ts: Defines MITRE ATT&CK technique data structure and exports an array of techniques covering Initial Access, Execution, Persistence, and Privilege Escalation tactics with IDs, names, and descriptions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, initializing with admin token and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAttackPathState.ts: Custom hook managing attack path diagram state including placed icons, connections, drawings, text labels, drawing tools, history/undo functionality, and element selection/transformation operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeleteDiagramState: Custom hook providing a mutation to delete diagram states by ID, invalidating the diagram list query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetAllDiagrams.ts: Custom hook that fetches all saved diagrams from the backend actor using React Query, enabled only when the actor is available.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: Custom hook that fetches the current user's profile from the backend, with loading state properly reflecting actor initialization dependency.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetDiagramState.ts: Custom hook that fetches a specific diagram state by ID from the backend actor using React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for managing user login/logout with AuthClient, including identity persistence, status tracking, and configurable options for idle handling and identity provider.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for report CRUD operations (get all, get by ID, save, delete) with local DetailedReport type definition. All backend methods are stubbed out and disabled since backend no longer supports report functionality.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: React Query mutation hook that saves the current user's profile via the actor's saveCallerUserProfile method and invalidates the currentUserProfile query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveDiagramState.t: React Query mutation hook that saves a diagram state (name and DiagramState object) via the actor and invalidates both diagramState and allDiagrams query caches on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme colors including primary, secondary, muted, destructive, and chart colors using oklch color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component into the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AttackPathPage.tsx: Attack path diagram editor page with toolbar, canvas, and dialogs for saving/loading diagrams. Manages state for icons, connections, drawings, and text labels with undo support and persistence via backend.
frontend/src/pages/CreateReportPage.tsx: Page component with a form for creating new threat hunt reports, handling submission via useSaveReport mutation and navigating back to home on success.
frontend/src/pages/ReportDetailPage.tsx: Displays detailed view of a single threat hunt report including executive summary, timeline, attack vector, evidence, affected systems, remediation actions, recommendations, threat actors, MITRE techniques, IOCs, and findings with PDF download capability.
frontend/src/pages/ReportListPage.tsx: Lists all threat hunting reports in a table with columns for title, author, date, technique count, and IOC count, plus actions for viewing, downloading PDF, and deleting reports.
frontend/src/types/html2canvas.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file for html2canvas library type definitions.
frontend/src/types/jspdf.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file for jspdf library type definitions.
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Generates printable PDF reports from threat hunting data by opening a new window with styled HTML content including metadata, threat actors, MITRE ATT&CK techniques, IOCs, and findings.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color schemes using OKLCH, typography, container settings, animations, and design tokens for a security-focused UI theme.
frontend/vite.config.ts: Vite build configuration for React app with path aliases, environment variable injection for canister IDs, proxy setup for local API calls, and optimizations for Internet Computer deployment.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking implemented features for a MITRE ATT&CK-based threat hunting report portal, including known issues with deployment and diagram tools.
